code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{getStats}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function LiveStats(){const[stats,setStats]=useState({});useEffect(()=>{const fetchStats=async()=>{try{const response=await getStats();setStats(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching stats:',error);}};fetchStats();const interval=setInterval(fetchStats,5000);return()=>clearInterval(interval);},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Live Stats"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["CO\u2082 Emissions: ",stats.co2||'Loading...']}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Energy Usage: ",stats.energy||'Loading...']})]});}export default LiveStats;
